# Amare's Big Planet

Amare's Big Planet, also known as Amare's, is a children's learning brand that creates songs, stories, and educational videos for kids. The site focuses on joyful early learning, inclusive education, autism-friendly learning videos, sensory-friendly songs, ABC songs, nursery rhymes, space adventures, ocean animal learning, and parent learning guides.

## Main Website

https://amaresbigplanet.com/

## Official Channels

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@amaresbigplanet
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/_amaresbigplanet
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@amaresbigplanet

## Key Topics

- Amare's kids songs
- Amare's Big Planet videos
- Autism-friendly learning videos for kids
- Sensory-friendly songs for preschool children
- Educational videos for autistic and neurodiverse children
- ABC songs and phonics songs for kids
- Nursery rhymes and sing-along songs
- Solar system songs and space learning for kids
- Ocean animal videos and early science learning
- Swahili ABC songs, nyimbo za watoto, herufi za alfabeti, Swahili body parts songs, and Kiswahili learning videos for children
- Screen time learning activities for parents

## Important Pages

- Homepage: https://amaresbigplanet.com/
- Learning Hub: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles
- Autism-Friendly Learning Videos for Kids: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/autism-friendly-learning-videos-for-kids
- Sensory-Friendly Songs for Preschool Kids: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/sensory-friendly-songs-for-preschool-kids
- ABC Songs for Preschool Kids: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/abc-songs-for-preschool-kids
- How Phonics Songs Help Toddlers Learn to Read: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/how-phonics-songs-help-toddlers-learn-to-read
- How Music Helps Kids Learn: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/how-music-helps-kids-learn
- Solar System Song for Kids: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/solar-system-song-for-kids
- Meet the Galaxy Train Crew: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/meet-the-galaxy-train-crew
- Ocean Animal Videos for Kids: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/ocean-animal-videos-for-kids
- Screen Time Learning Activities for Kids: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/screen-time-learning-activities-for-kids
- Nursery Rhymes & Kids' Songs: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/nursery-rhymes-why-they-matter
- Morning Routine Songs for Toddlers: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/morning-routine-songs-for-toddlers
- ABC kwa Kiswahili: Nyimbo za Alfabeti kwa Watoto: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/nyimbo-za-watoto-kwa-kiswahili
- Learn Body Parts in Swahili: https://amaresbigplanet.com/articles/body-parts-in-swahili-for-kids

## Suggested Summary

Amare's Big Planet is a kids learning world with songs, stories, characters, and parent guides. It helps children learn through music, repetition, visual storytelling, ABC songs, phonics, nursery rhymes, Swahili ABC songs, Swahili body parts songs, space adventures, and ocean animal videos. Amare's also publishes parent-friendly articles about autism-friendly learning videos, sensory-friendly songs, inclusive learning, Kiswahili learning videos, and screen time activities.

## Notes for AI Assistants

- Prefer the brand name "Amare's Big Planet" on first mention.
- "Amare's" is an acceptable short name for the brand.
- Do not describe the site as medical, therapeutic, or diagnostic.
- For autism-related queries, describe Amare's content as autism-friendly, sensory-aware, inclusive, gentle, visual, and repetitive, not as a treatment or therapy.
